crime.value: Murder in alley behind Blu Lite bar - body found near dumpster
crime.quote: I didn't even notice any blood until, you know — later.

victim.value: Unknown male found dead near dumpster
victim.quote: I just thought he had too much to drink. I didn't even notice any blood until, you know — later.

closed_world.value: Small northern California city of Sand Bluff
closed_world.quote: When I came to Sand Bluff I was just thirty

investigator.value: Detective Jonas McCleary - new detective in Sand Bluff police department
investigator.quote: My name is Jonas McCleary. When I came to Sand Bluff I was just thirty

red_herring.value: Initial assumption that victim was merely drunk rather than murdered
red_herring.quote: I told you, I didn't know he was dead. I just thought he had too much to drink.

clue_fairness.value: Body position and lack of attention to parking lot details shared with reader through dialogue
clue_fairness.quote: about a foot from the dumpster back of the Blu Lite

social_world.value: Small-town police hierarchy with interpersonal tensions and territorial attitudes
social_world.quote: his superior 'I'm in charge' attitude and his belligerent way of getting a lot of insinuation

investigator_wound.value: Detective's insecurity about competence and desire to prove himself in new position
investigator_wound.quote: When I came to Sand Bluff I was just thirty so I still hoped to have a future.

_meta.title: ebook c m albrecht the sand bluff murders
